commands.author: yetval

target.title: Fix Grok web billing status 7 auth and cookie bearer fetch
target.body:
## Summary

- Treat gRPC status 7 OAuth2 `bad-credentials` responses as auth failures without misclassifying scope-denied responses.
- Try browser cookies plus a non-expired bearer token before cookie-only; never transmit expired bearer credentials.
- Accept complete gRPC-web frames and raw protobuf billing responses, including current periods where proto3 omits a zero `credit_usage_percent`.
- Surface actionable grok.com or `grok login` reauthentication guidance.

## Problem

Grok web billing could fail with RPC status 7 even when the user had a current Chrome grok.com session and/or a usable CLI token. Successful billing responses also vary between framed and raw protobuf, and zero usage may omit the scalar percent field.

## Landing proof

Exact candidate: `f6654e969675c00a6976ecddb7b8f766ac7a6372`

- Focused tests: 55 tests in 3 suites passed.
- Full suite: 3,788 tests in 417 suites passed.
- Lint: 0 violations in 1,064 files.
- Release build: passed.
- Autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- Public Model Identifier Gate: PASS. Candidate diff/tests/logs contain no model identifiers; packaged-app scan found no candidate-only identifiers versus current main. Official catalogs used for classification: https://docs.x.ai/developers/models, https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/models/overview, https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/models, https://platform.moonshot.ai/docs/api/chat.

## Live app proof

Built and signed the exact candidate with the Apple Development identity. Deep strict code-sign verification passed.

- Bundle: `com.steipete.codexbar.debug`, build 82.
- Main executable SHA-256: `61287f97ac22e1846e51dd9baf455b9d0ed4ed48329bed945ba0ef664d473dd2`.
- Real provider/account boundary: isolated config with only Grok enabled, using the available Chrome grok.com session and actual account.
- Observed in the exact built app: Grok Credits rendered `100% left`, a monthly reset countdown, and `Updated just now`.
- This validates the status-7 cookie-plus-bearer recovery and the provider's omitted proto3 zero-percent response through the final UI.

## Test plan

- `swift test --filter 'GrokWebBillingFetcherTests|GrokAuthTests|CodexUserFacingErrorTests'`
- `swift test`
- `make check`
- `swift build -c release`
- exact signed-app live verification against grok.com
target.author: bcharleson
